ai_summary: Here is a 2-3 sentence executive summary of the document:  Insecticides (India) Limited reported robust Q1 FY2020 revenue and EBITDA growth of 12.5% and 13.6% respectively, despite a challenging delayed monsoon season. However, Net Profit After Tax (PAT) growth lagged significantly at 6% due to increased taxes and interest, while initial new product launch targets were scaled back due to delays. Management projects a robust Q2 recovery and maintains full-year targets, expecting a substantial reduction in high opening inventory and driving growth through R&D, exports, and planned manufacturing expansions.
